title: FatCat 100 Day Zombie Apocalypse
description: Yep another 100 day zombie apocalype modpack for ya all
body:
## Overview
Inspired by “Zombie Invade 100 Days” and “Hope and Despair” this modpack delivers a thrilling survival experience in a post-apocalyptic world. You and your teammates must band together to survive against increasingly dangerous mutated zombies. Each passing day brings harsher challenges. Can you survive until the end and overcome all dangers? Join and find out!
## **How to start challenge ?**

To start the challenge, once you have created and entered the world, open the chat bar and click on [click here]. Then, you can customize the difficulty to your preference.

## 🎉Thank you for 1000 downloads!
